texto: Welcome players… to both the story and experience of a survival-adventure ‘game’ that has become an extra reality for so many. It’s surely worth this telling since it’s as much your story as those involved in its creation, including so many scientists - those true pioneers - who still work to discover more of its secrets, in - and out - of the Source.
explicacao: Citação de Ade McOran-Campbell sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Welcome players… to both the story and experience of a survival-adventure ‘game’ that has become …” articula reflexao, spiritual-growth, story em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
